nasb.text: Moses said, “Eat it today, for today is a sabbath to the Lord; today you will not find it in the field.

esv.text: Moses said, “Eat it today, for today is a Sabbath to the Lord; today you will not find it in the field.

cnv.text: 摩西說：“今天吃這個吧，因為今天是向耶和華守的安息日，今日你們在田野裡必找不著。

ccb.text: 摩西对他们说：“你们今天就吃这些吧，因为今天是耶和华的安息日，地上不会有食物让你们拾取。
